title: Convert School Mitra to Progressive Web App with offline capabilities

requirements.text: Implement Progressive Web App (PWA) functionality including service worker registration, offline caching strategy for static assets and API responses, and cache management for optimal performance

quotes: yes but i want in PWA APP FORM can you create

acceptanceCriteria: Service worker is registered and activated successfully
Static assets (HTML, CSS, JS, images) are cached on first load
Previously loaded data (students, fees, attendance, teachers) is accessible when offline
Network requests fall back to cached data when offline
Cache is updated when online to ensure fresh data

requirements.text: Create and configure web app manifest (manifest.json) with School Mitra branding, app name, description, theme colors, background color, display mode set to 'standalone', and start URL

quotes: yes but i want in PWA APP FORM can you create

acceptanceCriteria: Manifest includes app name 'School Mitra'
Display mode is set to 'standalone' for app-like experience
Theme color and background color are configured
Manifest is properly linked in index.html
Start URL points to the root of the application

requirements.text: Generate and configure PWA app icons in multiple sizes (192x192, 512x512) for installation on various devices, and create a favicon for browser tab display
acceptanceCriteria: App icons are available in 192x192 and 512x512 sizes
Icons follow the School Mitra branding theme
Icons are referenced correctly in manifest.json
Favicon is visible in browser tabs
Icons display correctly when app is installed on devices

requirements.text: Add PWA install prompt component that detects when the app can be installed, displays a user-friendly install button or banner, handles the beforeinstallprompt event, and can be dismissed by the user

quotes: App-like experience with custom icon and splash screen

acceptanceCriteria: Install prompt appears when app meets PWA criteria
User can trigger installation by clicking the install button
Prompt can be dismissed and doesn't reappear immediately
Prompt is hidden after successful installation
Works on both desktop and mobile browsers that support PWA

requirements.text: Configure splash screen for PWA with School Mitra branding including app icon, name, and background color that displays during app launch on mobile devices

quotes: App-like experience with custom icon and splash screen

acceptanceCriteria: Splash screen displays School Mitra branding when app launches
Background color matches the app's theme
App icon is centered and properly sized on splash screen
Splash screen displays on both iOS and Android devices
Transition from splash screen to app is smooth

requirements.text: Implement offline fallback page that displays when users navigate to uncached pages while offline, with clear messaging about offline status and instructions to reconnect

quotes: Offline viewing of previously loaded data
When users go offline, they'll be able to view previously loaded data

acceptanceCriteria: Offline page displays when accessing uncached routes while offline
Page clearly indicates the app is offline
Page provides helpful instructions for the user
Page maintains School Mitra branding and styling
Page automatically redirects when connection is restored

requirements.text: Add meta tags to index.html for PWA support including viewport settings, theme-color for browser UI, apple-touch-icon for iOS devices, and mobile-web-app-capable tags

quotes: Installable on desktop and mobile devices

acceptanceCriteria: Viewport meta tag is properly configured for mobile responsiveness
Theme-color meta tag matches the app's primary color
Apple-specific meta tags are present for iOS PWA support
Mobile web app capable tags enable full-screen mode on iOS
All PWA-related meta tags are present and valid

requirements.text: Test and verify that all existing School Mitra features (student management, fee tracking, attendance, teacher management, role-based authentication) work correctly in PWA mode both online and offline with cached data

quotes: I want same features like school mitra
When users go offline, they'll be able to view previously loaded data

acceptanceCriteria: All features work in installed PWA mode
Previously loaded student data is viewable offline
Previously loaded fee records are accessible offline
Previously loaded attendance records can be viewed offline
Teacher management interface works in PWA mode for admins
Authentication state persists across PWA sessions
Role-based permissions function correctly in PWA mode

constraints: Must maintain all existing School Mitra features and functionality
Must preserve role-based access control (Admin with Internet Identity, Teacher with credentials)
Service worker must not interfere with Internet Identity authentication flow
PWA must work with the existing single-actor Motoko backend architecture
Must not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui/*
nonGoals: Full offline data entry with background sync (only viewing cached data offline)
Push notifications for new students or fee updates
App store distribution (iOS App Store, Google Play Store)
Native mobile app features like camera access or GPS
Offline-first database with local data persistence and conflict resolution

required: School Mitra app icon with education theme, clean modern design suitable for PWA installation (school-mitra-icon.dim_192x192.png)
School Mitra app icon in larger size for high-resolution displays and app stores (school-mitra-icon.dim_512x512.png)
School Mitra favicon for browser tabs, simple icon recognizable at small sizes (favicon.dim_32x32.png)
